description: CompositionGreen shirt with mild striping, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsRefresh your formal wardrobe with this shirt from arrow. This piece gives a face lift to your on-duty staples with its flattering cut and impeccable silhouetting. It sits well under a structured blazer for dressy occasions. Wear this with dark and light chinos to alternate between looks when you're heading to work. Style this with formal shoes from provogue, available online at myntra. For a stylish fusion of formal and casual, wear this with classic denims, a bold belt and tonal casual leather shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
